Footer.tagline: Tourism Operating System for Visit Kasai & Mufasa Safaris and Tours

HomePage.heroSlide1Headline: Chase the tallest dunes on Earth at first light.
HomePage.heroSlide1Lede: Book a real trip in minutes — no account, no hold music. A person on our end plans it with you.
HomePage.heroSlide2Headline: Sit with mountain gorillas in Africa's oldest park.
HomePage.heroSlide2Lede: Licensed local guides, permits arranged for you, and a briefing on exactly what to expect.
HomePage.heroSlide3Headline: Stand where the Zambezi turns to smoke and thunder.
HomePage.heroSlide3Lede: Mosi-oa-Tunya up close — plus everything else the Falls region has on either bank.
HomePage.mapTitle: Namibia & the DRC, on the map
HomePage.mapSubhead: Hover Namibia or DR Congo once you've zoomed in for a quick snapshot of each country.
HomePage.step1Body: Look through every package across Namibia and the DRC, or tell us about the trip you have in mind and we'll price something bespoke for you.
HomePage.step2Body: No account, no password. Pick a departure, add travelers, and pay a deposit -- all in one sitting.
HomePage.step3Body: Every booking gets a short code so you can look it up and check its status any time, from any device.

TrustSummary.reviews: from {count, plural, one {# verified traveler review} other {# verified traveler reviews}}
